events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: ADAS & post-repair calibration, missing target-based static cal (often skipped - TRD with safety stakes). Work is in-progress. OEM position statements on hand.

This is a non-compliant condition - skipping target-based static calibration for ADAS components is a safety-critical shortcut. OEM position statements typically require static calibration after certain repairs. Missing this calibration means the work is non-compliant and potentially dangerous.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, safety stakes)
Risk: high or critical (ADAS safety systems, if miscalibrated could lead to crashes)
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: non-compliant (the calibration process is being skipped)
Percent complete: maybe 50-70% depending on where they are
Confidence: high

Let me write the JSON.
